the_tension_set: Bend the signal, don't let it break / Feel the pressure that we have to take
Soft-clipped reality, hard-clipped soul / Losing the balance, taking control
Saturate the logic, warm up the void / Breathing the beauty that the noise destroyed
the_flexibility_set: Elastic frequencies, moving in the dark / Finding the glow in the digital spark
Rounded corners of the square-wave mind / Leaving the digital edges behind
Hyperbolic tangents, rising to the sun / The curve of the many, moving as one
the_clipping_dialogue: Push the limit / Hold the line

psychoacoustic_saturation_v4.the_warmth_factor: Saturation focus @ 300Hz-500Hz on the vocal-bus (+4dB drive)
